name: cursor-pre-push-vscode
description: AI-powered pre-push code review for Cursor

commands.title: 为当前工作区启用 Pre-push 审查
安装 Pre-push 依赖（Cursor Agent CLI）

cursorPrePush.enabled.description: 是否启用 Pre-push 审查

cursorPrePush.baseline.description: diff 对比基线；auto 时按 origin/stable → dev → main → master 自动选择

cursorPrePush.autoInstallDependencies.description: 扩展启动时自动安装 Cursor Agent CLI（审查引擎已内置在 VSIX 中）

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run bundle:review
scripts.bundle:review: cd ../cursor-pre-push-review && npm run build && cd ../cursor-pre-push-vscode && rm -rf node_modules/cursor-pre-push-review && mkdir -p node_modules/cursor-pre-push-review && cp -R ../cursor-pre-push-review/dist ../cursor-pre-push-review/bin ../cursor-pre-push-review/package.json node_modules/cursor-pre-push-review/ && npm install --prefix node_modules/cursor-pre-push-review --omit=dev
